scripts.build: bun run scripts/set-version.ts && bun build src/index.ts --compile --outfile dist/arb && git checkout src/version.ts
scripts.test:integration: bun run build && bun test test/integration/ --concurrent --timeout 30000
scripts.test:integration:git217: docker build -f test/docker/git217.Dockerfile -t arb-git217 test/docker/ && docker run --rm -v "$PWD":/app -w /app arb-git217
scripts.test:pbt: bun run build && bun test test/pbt/ --timeout 300000
scripts.check: bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run cycles && bun run test && bun run test:integration
